description: Worked intake scenarios for small business. Historical patterns, not one-week anecdotes.

examples.context: Email: need something for our event, looks professional, no size or date
Form: 11x17 flyer, 500 qty, July 20 deadline, file attached, payment ready
examples.resolution: Confirm receipt, human reviews file, quote + pay link in same thread within SLA

examples.context: Instagram DM: how much for logos?
examples.resolution: Do not drop price in DM. Clarify deliverable and usage.
examples.notes: Move to email when possible for paper trail.

examples.context: Email: you never sent the files I paid for last month
examples.resolution: Route mf-tpl-001. Recovery before new sale.

examples.context: Second email 6 hours later: anyone there???
examples.resolution: If first touch not sent yet: rush first-touch-standard instead of scolding
examples.notes: If truly no prior reply, apologize once and qualify.

examples.context: Bulk email offering SEO and guest posts
Need 200 shirts in 48 hours for company picnic
examples.resolution: Honest feasibility check. Rush fee or decline.

examples.context: Request for on-site install 400 miles away
examples.resolution: Polite no with optional local referral
